title: Datasets for ArchaeoPhases
text: can install latest version fasti repository :

title: Datasets for ArchaeoPhases
text: inst/ directory contains: ChronoModel v2.0.18 project[1] output files (chronomodel/ subdirectory). OxCal v4.4.4 script output files (oxcal/ subdirectory). BCal output files (bcal/ subdirectory). package allows replicate Bosch et al. (2015) results OxCal ChronoModel.
code: ## Install and load oxcAAR # install.packages("oxcAAR") library(oxcAAR)  ## Download and setup OxCal quickSetupOxcal()  ## Import the OxCal script path_script <- system.file("oxcal/ksarakil.oxcal", package = "fasti") ksarakil_script <- paste0(readLines(path_script), collapse = "\n")  ## Execute OxCal ksarakil_file <- executeOxcalScript(ksarakil_script) ksarakil_text <- readOxcalOutput(ksarakil_file) ksarakil_data <- parseFullOxcalOutput(ksarakil_text)  ## Get the MCMC samples path_mcmc <- paste0(dirname(ksarakil_file), "/MCMC_Sample.csv") mcmc <- read.csv(path_mcmc, header = TRUE, sep = ",", dec = ".")

title: Datasets for ArchaeoPhases
text: Bosch, M. D., Mannino, M. ., Prendergast, . L., O’Connell, T. C., Demarchi, B., Taylor, S. M., Niven, L., van der Plicht, J. Hublin, J.-J. (2015). New Chronology Ksâr ’Akil (Lebanon) Supports Levantine Route Modern Human Dispersal Europe. Proceedings National Academy Sciences, 112(25): 7683-8. DOI: 10.1073/pnas.1501529112.

title: Ksâr 'Akil Radiocarbon Dates — ksarakil
text: data.frame 16 rows 3 variables: Name Laboratory code. Date Radiocarbon date (year BP). Uncertainty Radiocarbon error (year).
